debug_info.goal:

e f : β

hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G✝ M
G : Graph α β

    refine fun I ⟨M, hM, hI⟩ => ?_

    · intro c hcI hchain hne
      refine ⟨⋃₀ c, ?_, fun s hs => Set.subset_sUnion_of_mem hs⟩
      obtain ⟨s, hs⟩ := hne

      exact hM''I hxt
    · exact ⟨M, hM, hI⟩
sorry

    refine ⟨fun S ↦ ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M), ?_⟩
    intro A hA hAX
    obtain ⟨MA, hMA, hAMA⟩ := hA
    by_cases hmax : G.IsMaxMatching MA
    · exact ⟨A ∩ X, ⟨MA, hMA, Set.inter_subset_left.trans hAMA⟩, Set.inter_subset_right, 
        Set.inter_subset_left, fun B hB hBX hAB ↦ hAB.antisymm (Set.subset_inter (fun b hbB ↦ by
          obtain ⟨MB, hMB, hBMB⟩ := hB
          by_contra hbA
          have hcard : MA.encard < MB.encard := by
            have := hmax.encard
            sorry
          sorry) hBX)⟩
    · obtain ⟨P, hP⟩ := hMA.exists_isAugPath_not_max hmax
      sorry

intro X hX
    refine ⟨fun S ↦ ∃ M, G.IsMatching M ∧ S ⊆ V(G, M), fun I hIX hI ↦ ?_⟩
    use fun J hJ hIJ ↦ ⟨hJ, hIJ⟩

intro X _
    refine fun I hI hIX ↦ ⟨I, hI, hIX, fun J hJ hIJ hJX ↦ hIJ.antisymm (hJX.trans hIX)⟩

intro X _ I ⟨M, hM, hI⟩
    refine ⟨V(G, M) ∩ X, ⟨⟨M, hM, Set.inter_subset_left⟩, Set.subset_inter hI (fun x hx => (hI hx).1), Set.inter_subset_right⟩, ?_⟩
    intro J ⟨M', hM', hJ⟩ hVMX hJX
    ext x
    constructor
    · intro hx
      exact ⟨hJ hx, hJX hx⟩
    · intro ⟨hxVM, hxX⟩
      exact hVMX ⟨hxVM, hxX⟩

intro X _ I ⟨M, hM, hI⟩
    refine ⟨V(G, M) ∩ X, ⟨M, hM, Set.inter_subset_left⟩, Set.subset_inter hI (by assumption), 
      Set.inter_subset_right, ?_⟩
    intro J ⟨M', hM', hJ⟩ hIJ hJX
    intro hVMJ
    have : J ⊆ V(G, M) ∩ X := Set.subset_inter (hVMJ ▸ hJ) hJX
    exact Set.subset_antisymm this hVMJ ▸ le_refl _
